txt_150: We collect information that you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, use our interactive services, or contact technical support. This information may include your name, email, and business details.
txt_152: We use the information we collect to provide our services, personalize your experience, process your transactions, and send technical updates or support messages. We also use it to train your AI models to improve virtual assistant responses.
txt_154: We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information with trusted service providers who help us operate our Platform, provided that they are committed to keeping this information confidential.
txt_156: We take reasonable security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, modification or disclosure. However, no transmission over the Internet or electronic storage system is 100% secure.
txt_158: You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of the personal information we hold about you. You may contact us at any time to exercise these rights.
txt_165: It helps us equip the smart assistant in the best way that suits your industry.
txt_170: By using the AI ​​Business Assistant Platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
txt_172: We provide an AI-based platform to help business owners manage conversations, bookings, sales, and policies for their business. We may modify or discontinue the Service at any time.
txt_174: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. Please notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
txt_176: You undertake not to use the platform for any illegal or unauthorized purpose, including sending annoying or harmful messages to users.
